## `01` — About

Full-stack **MERN developer** and **AI/ML engineer** based in Bhubaneswar, India.
I build products that live at the intersection of robust web architecture and intelligent systems.

From deploying **real-time computer vision** at enterprise scale inside the Aditya Birla Group,
to engineering an EdTech platform with role-based auth and payment processing — I ship things that work.

Strong foundations in **Data Structures & Algorithms**, clean REST API design, and scalable state management. Always learning. Always building.

```
Location  →  Bhubaneswar, India
Status    →  Open to Work · B.Tech @ KIIT University (2023–Present)
CGPA      →  7.57
```

---

## `03` — Experience

### Aditya Birla Group — IT Intern · Computer Vision & AI
**UltraTech Cement, Aditya Cement Works** &nbsp;|&nbsp; `May – Jun 2025`

Designed and deployed a real-time automated attendance system for enterprise-scale operations at one of India's largest conglomerates.

- Built and trained a **face recognition model** for accurate, contactless employee tracking
- Integrated **automated record management** with exportable compliance reports
- System adopted across all enterprise end-users at facility scale

`Python` `OpenCV` `NumPy` `Pandas` `Face Recognition` `Enterprise Deployment`

---

## `04` — Projects

### 01 · Lie Detector
> YouTube Comment Forensics Tool

Fetches & preprocesses comments via YouTube Data API, applies a pre-trained BERT model for sentiment analysis and comment authenticity classification. Extending towards bot, promoter, and spam detection for full content credibility scoring.

`Python` `BERT` `NLP` `Flutter` `React.js` `YouTube API` `ML`

[![View on GitHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/View_on_GitHub-0a0a0a?style=flat-square&logo=github&logoColor=white)](https://github.com/swastikabarman/Youtube_Spam_Comments_Detention)

---

### 02 · StudyNotion
> Comprehensive MERN EdTech Platform

Student / Instructor / Admin roles with Razorpay webhooks for payment consistency, JWT + bcrypt auth, OTP via Nodemailer, Redux Toolkit global state, and Cloudinary media delivery for video lectures.

`React.js` `Node.js` `Express.js` `MongoDB` `Redux` `Razorpay` `Cloudinary` `JWT`

[![View on GitHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/View_on_GitHub-0a0a0a?style=flat-square&logo=github&logoColor=white)](https://github.com/shivam10-bit/StudyNotion-Hosting)

---

### 03 · Automated Attendance System
> Enterprise Face Recognition — Aditya Birla Group

Real-time face recognition attendance tracker built for enterprise deployment. Secure database management, automated exportable reports for compliance, HR analytics, and operational oversight at scale.

`Python` `OpenCV` `NumPy` `Pandas` `Face Recognition`

[![View on GitHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/View_on_GitHub-0a0a0a?style=flat-square&logo=github&logoColor=white)](https://github.com/shivam10-bit/Internship-Project)
